name: 02_key_columns_ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_rms
statement:
SELECT table_catalog, table_schema, table_name, column_name, data_type, ordinal_position
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_rms`.information_schema.columns
WHERE table_schema = 'dbo'
  AND lower(table_name) IN ('asset', 'vassetlocation', 'job', 'vjob', 'jobasset', 'jobcomment', 'inspection', 'vinspection', 'inspectionstatus', 'photo', 'formfield', 'module', 'workflowstatus', 'contractreference', 'capitalwork', 'capitalworktask', 'resource', 'plannedresourceitem', 'timesheetitem')
ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position
